title: Hydrogen Allocation Round 2 (HAR2): projects
body: "These 27 shortlisted projects across England, Scotland and Wales have been invited to the next stage of the Second Hydrogen Allocation Round (HAR2) process, which includes due diligence and a cost assessment.  This reinforces the key role low carbon hydrogen will play in delivering our Clean Energy Superpower and Growth Missions, and longer-term net zero commitments, as a key enabler of a low carbon and renewables-based energy system.  "
